svg.title: KAM–restaurant channel: highlighted actors in a Rappi-centric view
svg.desc: Food delivery ecosystem with only KAM-restaurant related actors highlighted in Rappi orange

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does KAM performance affect the consumer experience?')
sendPrompt('What does a KAM do at Rappi?')
sendPrompt('How does a KAM upsell ad placements to restaurants?')
sendPrompt('How does support ops help KAMs with restaurant issues?')
sendPrompt('How does a restaurant decide which platform to prioritize?')
sendPrompt('How do competitors like Uber Eats and Didi Food court the same restaurants?')
sendPrompt('How does the KAM affect courier experience at a restaurant?')
sendPrompt('How does the KAM help restaurants integrate POS systems?')
sendPrompt('How does a KAM use analytics dashboards with restaurants?')
